heroDesc: Full-stack developer & UI/UX enthusiast crafting beautiful, functional web experiences
aboutText1: I'm a passionate full-stack developer who loves building modern, responsive, and user-friendly applications.
aboutText2: I focus on creating smooth user experiences and clean UI with attention to detail.

projectsSubtitle: Here are some of my recent projects.
projectDesc1: This is a landing page for a surfing school. It has a modern design with ocean-themed visuals. The page provides course details and a contact section.
projectDesc2: This is a stylish Dior-themed page. It showcases elegant design with luxury aesthetics. The layout highlights fashion and beauty elements.
projectDesc3: This page is dedicated to the Lamborghini Urus. It features a sleek design with high-quality car images. The layout emphasizes speed, luxury, and performance.
projectDesc4: This is a simple sandbox page. It features interactive elements for testing. The design is minimalistic and clean.
projectDesc5: This is a simple films app. It about films in charts. And also you can find any film and save it to favorites.
projectDesc6: This is a react full stack app. About the best ideas to your startup. Where you can also add your own idea.
projectDesc7: This is a landing page. About the best company for your house. Where you can also create your own house.
projectDesc8: This is a landing page. About the best e-commerce site for you. Where you can order some clothes for you and your family.
projectDesc9: This is a web animations collection site. About the best web aanimations site for you. Where you can find some awesome ways to implement animations into your application or landing page.
skillsSubtitle: A comprehensive overview of my technical skills and proficiency levels.
contactSubtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you!
leftText: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
